summary: This document outlines the deployment evaluation checklist and infrastructure qualification process for KeepMeCompany's AI phone agent system. It details the cloud-based infrastructure complexity, risk mitigations, and a structured 4-week installation plan with specific acceptance criteria for medical center integration. The checklist ensures patient safety and data security during the deployment of the AI voice system within NHS GP practices.
